executives.name: George Brack
executives.background: Mr. Brack has over 30 years of experience in the mining investment banking and corporate development sectors. He was previously the Managing Director and Industry Head, Mining at BMO Nesbitt Burns.

executives.name: Simon Slesarewich
executives.background: Simon Slesarewich is a mining engineer with over 25 years' experience in the resources industry. He has held various executive and operational roles, including CEO of Northern Graphite and Boardwalk Resources. He has significant experience in project development and operations.

board_of_directors.background: Mr. Brack has over 30 years of experience in the mining investment banking and corporate development sectors. He was previously the Managing Director and Industry Head, Mining at BMO Nesbitt Burns.
